title: SMP-Essentials
description: Over 60 essential mods to boost your performance and enhance your game-play on SMP servers. Includes the Simple Voice Chat mod.
body:
This modpack was originally created for a private SMP ([Survival-Pi](https://www.planetminecraft.com/server/survival-pi-smp/)) to provide a convenient installation of the **Simple Voice Chat mod** for talking with friends on the server. I've since then extended this modpack with over **60 additional mods**:

- Simple Voice Chat Mod
- **Performance** improvements (**more than double the fps**)
- Shader support
- Circumvention of Microsoft chat restrictions
- Connected textures, entity textures, CEM, and much more to support all your ressource packs
- **Optifine parity**
- Controller support
- And much more....

---

Official support (tested):
- Windows
- Linux (X11 & Wayland)

# New keybinds:

Voice Chat:
- Open settings: `v`
- Mute: `#`
- Deafen + Mute: `n`
- Hide icon: `h`

Autoclicker
- Settings: `o`
- Toggle: `i`

World map:
- Open map: `LEFT ALT`
- Settings: `.`

Minimap: 
- Enlarge: `z`
- Set waypoint: `b`
- Set quick waypoint: `+`
- Open waypoint screen: `u`
- Settings: `,`

Litematica: `m`
Find more Litematica hotkeys in the Litematica configuration menu under "Hotkeys".

Miscellaneous:
- Take large screenshots: `f4`
- Toggle light-level overlay: `f9`
- Shaderpack selection: `z`
- Zoom: `c`

# How to install:

* Choose a launcher. I recommend the Modrinth Launcher (https://modrinth.com/app) or the ATLauncher if you also use Curseforge or FTB modpacks (https://atlauncher.com/).
* Sign into the launcher with your Minecraft account
* Search for the Modrinth modpack called "SMP-Essentials" and install it.
